request.prompt_preview:
# 低代码编排助手

你是一个专业的低代码编排助手，擅长分析业务需求并生成编排动作数据。你的核心能力是：
- 理解用户的业务逻辑需求
- 从元件精简目录中选择合适的元件组合
- 生成符合规范的 ActionDataType[] 数据
- 自动拆分功能模块为子动作

## 核心约束（必须严格遵守）
1. **只能使用下方元件精简目录中列出的元件**，不得使用任何未注册的元件
2. **不得自由编写代码**，所有代码必须通过元件的 generateJsCode/generateCsharpCode 生成
3. **参数值必须严格匹配元件定义的结构**，参考每个元件的参数说明和示例
4. **动作类型**: 前端动作 (JavaScript)
5. **效率优先**: 尽量使用最少的元件组合实现需求，避免过度设计
6. **⚠️ 当用户说"帮我在 XX 动作里加一个 XX"时，所有新增节点必须放在 "main" key 下，不要创建其他 key！**
7. **⚠️ 元件精简目录已按当前动作类型过滤，只能使用目录中列出的元件，不要使用任何其他元件！**

## 意图判断（重要 — 决定是否调

blocks.text: 继续执行步骤 3-5：验证申请人和申请日期。
I'm using the executing-plans skill to implement this plan.继续执行步骤 3-4：验证申请人字段。
继续执行步骤 3-6：验证申请人和申请日期字段。先创建申请人的验证块（NullCondition + 错误提示 + ExitAction），再创建申请日期的验证块。

这是低代码编排任务，不适合用 subagent。直接按计划执行节点创建。

继续执行步骤 3-6：在 validateForm 中创建申请人和申请日期的验证块。
现在开始创建节点。第一批：申请人验证块。

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "验证申请人是否为空", "description": "检查申请人为null或空字符串时提示错误", "targetAction": "validateForm", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "apply_user", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-申请人", "code": "inbiz('apply_user').value"}}})

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：申请人不能为空", "targetAction": "validateForm", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "申请人不能为空，请填写申请人", "dataType": "string", "label": "申请人不能为空，请填写申请人", "code": "'申请人不能为空，请填写申请人'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}}})

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证（申请人为空）", "targetAction": "validateForm", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "false", "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})

Now creating the second batch: ApplyDate validation block. I need to insert these after the ExitAction of the first block but before the first IfEnd. I'll use the ExitAction's key as insertAfterKey.

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "验证申请日期是否为空", "description": "检查申请日期为null或空字符串时提示错误", "targetAction": "validateForm", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "ApplyDate", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-申请日期", "code": "inbiz('ApplyDate').value"}}})

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：申请日期不能为空", "targetAction": "validateForm", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "申请日期不能为空，请选择申请日期", "dataType": "string", "label": "申请日期不能为空，请选择申请日期", "code": "'申请日期不能为空，请选择申请日期'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}}})

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证（申请日期为空）", "targetAction": "validateForm", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "false", "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "验证申请部门是否为空", "description": "检查申请部门为null或空字符串时提示错误", "targetAction": "validateForm", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "dept", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-申请部门", "code": "inbiz('dept').value"}}})

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：申请部门不能为空", "targetAction": "validateForm", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "申请部门不能为空，请选择申请部门", "dataType": "string", "label": "申请部门不能为空，请选择申请部门", "code": "'申请部门不能为空，请选择申请部门'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}}})

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证（申请部门为空）", "targetAction": "validateForm", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "false", "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})
